item.title: LEGO 10977 DUPLO My First Puppy & Kitten With Sounds Pet Animal Toys for Toddlers 1 .5-3 Years Old Early Development Set with Large Bricks
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 10977 DUPLO My First Puppy & Kitten With Sounds Pet Animal Toys for Toddlers 1 .5-3 Years Old Early Development Set with Large Bricks here: ℹ️: The sounds enhance play and learn possibilities with noises indicating when to eat, play and sleep, teaching toddlers about daily routines This LEGO DUPLO pet animal toy set includes buildable kitten and puppy toys for toddlers that make realistic sounds plus a pet play hoop With this early development learning toy, toddlers assemble 2 bricks to build each toy animal, then care for them and listen to their needs Give this hands-on playset as a birthday present, Christmas gift or any-day treat to boys and girls aged 1.
